prompt: Create a plugin system with two files: plugin-host.js (PluginHost class with register(name, plugin), unregister(name), execute(name, ...args), and listPlugins() methods) and sample-plugins.js (export at least 2 sample plugins - 'uppercase' that converts text to uppercase and 'reverse' that reverses text). Each plugin is an object with a name property and an execute method.
description: Build a plugin host system with registration, execution, and sample plugins
